name: The Cave Golf Club
about: The Cave Golf Club is an indoor golf venue in Estero, Florida, offering state-of-the-art TrackMan simulators with access to 500+ virtual courses, including legendary PGA Tour venues. The facility combines a driving range, sports bar, and clubhouse under one roof, providing a laid-back atmosphere with no dress code. Pricing is based on hourly bay rentals, with options for practice sessions, competitions, and group events. It is suitable for golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to seasoned players, and offers additional services like leagues, parties, and seasonal coaching.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade TrackMan technology with detailed swing analysis
500+ world-class virtual courses, including Pebble Beach and St. Andrews
Laid-back, no-dress-code atmosphere welcoming all skill levels
On-site sports bar with food and drink options

food_and_drink.notes: Beer, wine, and seltzers available; all-day happy hour specials

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art simulators with professional-grade ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, clubs are typically provided, but you are welcome to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food is not allowed, but the venue offers a full bar and kitchen with food and drink options available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is The Cave kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Cave is all-ages welcome and offers kid-friendly games, activities, and birthday parties.
